root_text.sn38.4:1.1: “Kimatthiyaṁ, āvuso sāriputta, samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṁ vussatī”ti?
root_text.sn38.4:1.2: “Dukkhassa kho, āvuso, pariññatthaṁ bhagavati brahmacariyaṁ vussatī”ti.
root_text.sn38.4:1.3: “Atthi panāvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā”ti?
root_text.sn38.4:1.4: “Atthi kho, āvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā”ti?
root_text.sn38.4:1.5: “Katamo panāvuso, maggo katamā paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā”ti?
root_text.sn38.4:2.1: “Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, etassa dukkhassa pariññāya, seyyathidaṁ—
root_text.sn38.4:2.3: Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, maggo ayaṁ paṭipadā etassa dukkhassa pariññāyā”ti.
root_text.sn38.4:2.4: “Bhaddako, āvuso, maggo bhaddikā paṭipadā, etassa dukkhassa pariññāya.

translation_text.sn38.4:1.1: “Reverend Sāriputta, what’s the purpose of leading the spiritual life under the ascetic Gotama?”
translation_text.sn38.4:1.2: “The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand suffering.”
translation_text.sn38.4:1.3: “But, reverend, is there a path and a practice for completely understanding this suffering?”
